title: “My Hospital Operated On An Alien!” -Top Surgeon [Exclusive Interview]
summary: This interview covers the 1996 Varginha UFO incident in Brazil, featuring three key witnesses: Carlos Doza, a pilot who witnessed a UFO crash and held debris from the craft; a neurosurgeon who encountered an extraterrestrial being in a hospital; and a doctor who performed an autopsy on a soldier allegedly wounded by an alien. The testimony details the crash site, military response, intimidation by Men in Black figures, and the physical characteristics of the craft and its debris.

speakers.guest: Carlos Doza, Dr. Italo Ventterelli, Dr. Armando Fortonado

acronyms.expansion: Escola de Sargentos das Armas (Army Sergeant School)
acronyms.definition: Brazilian Army sergeant training school located near the crash site

events.description: Carlos Doza witnessed a UFO crash near Varginha, Brazil, and briefly held debris from the craft before being confronted by military personnel
Girls in Varginha, Brazil witnessed an extraterrestrial creature approximately 5-6 days after the UFO crash
The Nimitz incident involving Commander David Fravor and a tic-tac shaped UFO
James Fox visited the crash site and interviewed witnesses including a farm hand who confirmed hearing a boom sound

key_claims.claim: The UFO debris was extremely lightweight like aluminum foil and when crumpled would immediately return to its original shape like memory metal
The crashed UFO was cylindrical/cigar-shaped, approximately the size of a school bus, similar to the tic-tac shape from the Nimitz incident
The crash site smelled strongly of ammonia mixed with sulfur/rotten eggs rather than conventional fuel
Brazilian military arrived within 2-3 minutes of the crash and threatened witnesses at gunpoint
Men in Black figures in an unmarked car knew Carlos Doza's personal information including his address and wife's name within 10-15 minutes of the crash
US Air Force planes landed in Brazil without authorization from the Brazilian government in connection with this incident
Lab analysis of soil and tree samples from the crash site showed burning caused by unknown chemical products
James Fox has spoken to 12-15 witnesses who saw the ship and approximately 5 witnesses who saw alien bodies
A neurosurgeon was face to face with an extraterrestrial being for 3-4 minutes while it was recovering in a hospital bed
The extraterrestrial being in the hospital appeared highly intelligent, unafraid, and seemed to have control of the room
